query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_queries (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  question TEXT NOT NULL,
  rewritten_question TEXT,
  search_mode ENUM('mszt', 'internal', 'combined') DEFAULT 'combined' NOT NULL,
  answer_length ENUM('short', 'standard', 'detailed') DEFAULT 'standard' NOT NULL,
  operation_mode ENUM('fast', 'accurate') DEFAULT 'accurate' NOT NULL,
  answer TEXT,
  extended_answer TEXT,
  confidence ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high'),
  sources JSON,
  has_sufficient_sources TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  self_check_passed TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  self_check_notes TEXT,
  user_id INT,
  project_name VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT,
  answer_length ENUM('short', 'standard', 'detailed') DEFAULT 'standard' NOT NULL,
  operation_mode ENUM('fast', 'accurate') DEFAULT 'accurate' NOT NULL,
  search_mode ENUM('mszt', 'internal', 'combined') DEFAULT 'combined' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
